ogTitle: Kangaroo Gully vs Kanowna: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kangaroo Gully and Kanowna.
heading: Kangaroo Gully vs Kanowna — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kangaroo Gully, Western Australia and Kanowna, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kangaroo Gully has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Kanowna (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kangaroo Gully or Kanowna safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Gully has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Kanowna scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Gully scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Kanowna scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kangaroo Gully or Kanowna?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kangaroo Gully has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
